_comment: Canonical response shapes for SSE push operations. g8ee pushes SSE events to g8ed for delivery to web sessions. Consumers: g8ee (Python), g8ed (JS).

sse_push_response._description: Response from POST /api/internal/sse/push. Indicates whether the push was accepted and how many SSE connections it was delivered to.

success.description: Whether the push was accepted and processed

delivered.description: Number of SSE connections the event was delivered to. Zero is legitimate for BackgroundEvents when the user has no connected sessions.
